rationale.R1.5: The rewrite proposes a clear and logical structure for the paper, with each section serving a distinct purpose.
rationale.RX.1: While the text mentions uncertainty in some places (e.g., flagging intervals), it doesn't explicitly quantify or disclose confidence levels for individual claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output directly addresses all the dimensions specified in J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were identified in the revised text.
rationale.RX.5: Some edits and rewrites are not explicitly traced back to their sources.
